experiences.title: Chef's Table Experience
experiences.subtitle: An Evening in Our Kitchen
experiences.description: Dine at the heart of our kitchen with Chef Dubois. An intimate 6-seat table with a bespoke 10-course menu, live culinary theatre, and personalised wine pairing.
experiences.priceNote: per person, inclusive of wine pairing

experiences.title: Cave Privée Dinner
experiences.subtitle: Our Historic Wine Cellar
experiences.description: A private dining experience in our 1920s stone wine cellar. Seats up to 12 guests. Includes a guided tour of our 2,000-bottle collection with the sommelier.

experiences.title: Sunday Garden Brunch
experiences.subtitle: Terrace & Champagne
experiences.description: A leisurely Sunday affair on our garden terrace. Free-flow Laurent-Perrier champagne, à la carte brunch menu, and live classical quartet from 12 noon.

experiences.title: Carte Blanche Dinner
experiences.subtitle: Trust the Chef Completely
experiences.description: Surrender your evening entirely to Chef Dubois. No menu — just the finest ingredients of the day, composed into an unrepeatable 7-course masterpiece.
